value_assessment: Round 2 significantly strengthens the manuscript. GSEA revealed mitochondrial energy metabolism as the key convergent pathway in turquoise - this was completely missed by round 1 ORA. ECM score correlations add a structural dimension. Signed network confirms module integrity.
headline: High heart-rate bat and shrew converge on mitochondrial energy metabolism co-expression module
manuscript_framing: Frame as convergent molecular evolution: independent lineages (bat + shrew) evolved high heart rates through shared mitochondrial energy metabolism gene networks. ECM remodeling as secondary adaptation.
